heroHeadline: Day 39: 3 Killed Near Israeli Consulate in Istanbul as US-Israeli Strikes Hit Northern Iran
heroSubtitle: Shooting near Israeli consulate in Istanbul kills three in major regional spillover incident; US-Israeli airstrikes continue destroying infrastructure in northern Iran on Day 39 of the conflict.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-07. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
